name: Aider
project_binding_recipe: Bind the working tree in HASP before starting the stdio tool path for aider tasks.
approval_path: Let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session, then use project and secret windows for longer aider runs.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp run for command execution or hasp_inject through the generic tool path.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env with explicit convenience grants for .env.local style files.
